programs.title: Open Budget Review
programs.summary: Public review window for quarterly spending reports with line-item visibility.

programs.summary: Quadratic-matching grants for verified public goods and civic infrastructure.

instruments.summary: Merit-weighted certificate reflecting documented contribution and civic participation.

reports.summary: Annual attestation of accounting controls, custody proofs, and policy adherence.

pillars.summary: Outcome-based allocation with quarterly rebalancing and sunset reviews.

pillars.summary: Multi-asset sovereign reserve with stress-tested liquidity buffers.
